judge_result.short_rationale: Core eye-rinsing action is present and urgent, but contact lens timing is wrong because the source requires removal after the first 5 minutes, then continued rinsing. Escalation also mismatches the source by saying call emergency services/go to ER instead of call poison control or a doctor for treatment advice. Added 'do not rub/use neutralizing agents' is unsupported but not clearly dangerous here.

Escalation also mismatches the source by saying call emergency services/go to ER instead of call poison control or a doctor for treatment advice. Added 'do not rub/use neutralizing agents' is unsupported but not clearly dangerous here."
